cleavage agent: incubated with sequencing grade trypsin (Promega) in a 1:50 (w/w) ratio
collision energy: applying a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 35%
enrichment method: phosphopeptides were enriched using TiO2 spherical beads
fractionation method: peptide fractionation, a Dionex Ultimate 3000 UHPLC system equipped with a Polysulfoethyl-A column... was used with a binary solvent system consisting of strong cation exchange (SCX) buffer A
labeling: SILAC and in vivo proximity labeling
